profile.name: Ashutosh Verma
profile.description: Software Development Engineer with a strong foundation in problem-solving, having practiced 1500+ coding questions, and well-versed in Computer Science fundamentals. Experienced in backend-focused full-stack development and an open-source contributor to large-scale applications.

experience.title: Software Engineer-I
description: Delivered a multi-tenant promo-service serving 10+ clients, driving promo listing and order application.
Incorporated Kafka producer-consumer pipelines for bulk uploads and quantity-purchase aggregations, optimizing promo fetch response latency by 20%.
Devised a config-driven HTTP engine abstracting inbound API contracts, enabling zero-code onboarding.

experience.title: Open-Source Contributor - VideoLAN
description: Engineered VLC Media Player’s Home view, featuring 3 media discovery sections enhancing accessibility.
Shipped 7+ APIs in the Media Library powering unified audio-video retrieval and history search, reducing query overhead and eliminating redundant media calls.
Introduced 4+ QtCore C++ backend models and 5+ QtQuick QML frontend views, refining modularity.

projects.title: Product Analytics System
description: Built a system to track views and provide analytics, using Kafka for asynchronous event processing.
Designed a flexible caching system supporting 2 eviction strategies (LRU, LFU) and 3 write policies (write-through, write-back, write-around) to improve performance.
Integrated LLM-powered natural language to SQL query generation, enabling users to query analytics data.

projects.title: Hospital Management Application
description: Coded a scalable application with 5 entities: patients, doctors, appointments, departments, and insurances.
Programmed RESTful APIs providing CRUD operations along with enforced entity relationships, database constraints, and input validation
Utilized JSON Web Tokens for authentication and enabled role-based authorization for 3 user roles.
